channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 37% of mobile money reconciliations fail
item.description: Reconciled 98.4% of mobile money transactions by switching to webhooks and ledger-line matching — the edge cases Flutterwave and Paystack don’t document and how to fix them

item.title: Replace .env with these in 2026
item.description: Cut secrets-related outages 90% with AWS Secrets Manager and Teller — rotation without downtime, cache stampede fixes, and the $18k mistake most teams repeat.

item.title: Postmortem AI agent failures: human review vs pure
item.description: AI agent postmortem methods compared: human review vs automated metrics with concrete numbers on latency, cost, and error rates. Use this to pick the right approach for your 2026 workload.

item.title: Progressive Web Apps: what browser APIs finally fixed
item.description: Cut dev cost 40% with PWA in 2026 — Service Worker, manifest v3, and the iOS cache limit that breaks offline promises.

item.title: HTMX swapped React for me in 2026
item.description: Cut 74 % of JavaScript and slash AWS bills 60 % by switching to HTMX in 2026 — real benchmarks, real trade-offs, and the exact versions that worked.

item.title: Frontend testing stack 2026: Playwright beats Vitest +
item.description: Cut frontend test flakes 95% and build time 83% by dropping Cypress for Playwright + Vitest in 2026 — real numbers, real migrations, and the one mistake that cost me days

item.title: Platforms that scale: the 3 sizes that actually work
item.description: Stop writing IaaC wrappers: the 3 platform patterns that actually work in 2026 with concrete numbers, code, and failure modes nobody documents.

item.title: Compare 3 IaC tools post-HashiCorp fork
item.description: Cut Terraform apply time 40% with Pulumi in 2026 — licensing, speed, and hiring trade-offs after the HashiCorp fork

item.title: Code AI won’t rewrite
item.description: Cut PR review time 65% with AI and semgrep on legacy Java/Python monoliths — $38/month for 200k tx/day, concrete prompts, and the race condition AI caught before production.

item.title: Move images 50% faster in 2026 with Starlink CDN
item.description: Cut image upload time 60% with Starlink CDN — Lambda@Edge, sharp 0.33.2, and the resize mistakes most teams make.

item.title: LLM evals: the 3 metrics that pay off
item.description: Cut API response cost 63% by measuring only 3 LLM metrics — latency P95, cost per resolved conversation, and trust drift. Real Nairobi fintech numbers, code, and the mistakes that cost money.

item.title: 4 experimentation platforms worth running in production
item.description: Cut experiment rollout costs 60% with these 4 experimentation platforms — median latency, rollback time, and the kill switch mistake most teams miss.

item.title: African devs: Arc vs Andela vs Toptal in 2026
item.description: Pick the best freelance platform for African devs in 2026 — Contra, Toptal, Andela, or Arc — with real payout data, error fixes, and a 30-minute setup plan.

item.title: AWS FinOps levers: what mid-size teams ignore in 2026
item.description: Save 25–35% on AWS bills in 2026: why Compute Savings Plans beat Reserved Instances for mid-size teams, with real benchmarks and Terraform examples.

item.title: AI-proof skills: the 3 skills worth $100k in 2026
item.description: Protect your $100k salary from AI automation: the 3 non-automatable skills every solo founder must master in 2026 — latency, cost, and debuggability

item.title: Land $5K roles from Nairobi & Lagos in 2026
item.description: Land $5k/month remote roles with US startups from Nairobi and Lagos — the Nairobi/Lagos playbook with metrics, tools, and case studies from 2026 hires.

item.title: AI pair programming cut our reviews in half
item.description: Cut PR review time 38% with Cursor v2.5.0 — the AI pair tool that actually bridged ticket context and code changes

item.title: Daraja 2.0: 3 changes that broke my checkout flow
item.description: Cut M-Pesa checkout timeout 75% by migrating to Daraja 2.0 OAuth and TLS 1.3 — exact Node.js steps, error codes, and webhook signature verification

item.title: Replace PR checklists with agents
item.description: Replace static PR checklists with AI agents in 2026 — cut review time 73%, false negatives 80%, and save $38k/year with real metrics, tools, and a 30-minute setup checklist.

item.title: Ship SBOMs in 30 mins with Syft 1.8
item.description: Automate SBOM generation and vulnerability scanning in 30 minutes using Syft 1.8 and GitHub Actions to meet 2026 EU/US requirements and slash manual checklist time 92%
